211102011022221101220111221212101002000000120212210 - ASI: 31

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  02 = 0 * 2
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  22 = 2 * 2
  011 = 0 * 11
  102 = 1 * 02
  122 = 1 * 22
  211 = 2 * 11
  0012 = 00 * 12
  0122 = 0 * 122
  0200 = 02 * 00
  0222 = 02 * 22
  1210 = 12 * 10
  12210 = 122 * 10
  000012 = 00 * 0012
  011122 = 011 * 122
  100200 = 10 * 0200
  121210 = 12 * 1210
  211102 = 211 * 102
  0110222 = 011 * 0222
  0212210 = 02 * 12210
  2110122 = 211 * 0122
  121210100200 = 121210 * 100200
  0000120212210 = 000012 * 0212210
  2110122011122 = 2110122 * 011122
  2111020110222 = 211102 * 0110222
  1212101002000000120212210 = 121210100200 * 0000120212210
  21110201102222110122011122 = 2111020110222 * 2110122011122
  211102011022221101220111221212101002000000120212210 = 21110201102222110122011122 * 1212101002000000120212210
